integrityChip.intact: hash chain intact · {template} · {count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}
integrityChip.broken: hash chain check failed · {template} · {count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}

marketing.headline: AI advisory accounting for European small businesses.
marketing.subheadline: Sweden-first depth — BAS accounts, moms, and Bokföringslagen built in. The AI advises and cites; every posting is approved by you on an append-only, verifiable ledger.
marketing.demoNotice: Demo mode is intentionally using local scaffold behavior so it is never mistaken for live accounting.

captureLane.description: Every receipt lands as reviewable evidence — camera, paste, upload, and share go through the same local-first draft queue.

innovation.description: AI here is labeled and cites its sources (EU AI Act, Article 50) and holds no posting authority — the review queue is the only path into your ledger.

shell.demoBanner: Demo mode is active. Local demo data and local AI fallback are enabled intentionally.

captureSheet.title: Add business evidence
captureSheet.description: Capture starts locally first so the UI stays responsive. The result tells you whether the draft was stored persistently or only for this tab.
captureSheet.pasteHint: Paste works on the Capture page — press Ctrl+V (or Cmd+V) there to capture a copied image.
captureSheet.shareHint: Use your device's share menu and pick JPX Accounting to send evidence here.

today.title: Review-ready bookkeeping, shaped for the phone first.
today.description: Evidence arrives once, suggestions stay explainable, and the queue keeps the real accounting work above the fold instead of hiding it under dashboard chrome.
today.queueTitle: Keep the next accounting decision obvious.
today.queueDescription: Cards stay compact on mobile, expand on larger screens, and keep AI reasoning behind secondary disclosure until it is needed.

editSheet.title: Edit before approval
editSheet.description: Correct the account, VAT code, or amounts — approving posts the corrected lines.
editSheet.amountError: Net + VAT must equal gross (within 0.01); all three amounts are required when any of them changes.
editSheet.submitError: The edited approval could not be completed.
editSheet.appendOnlyNote: Approving posts new ledger lines with your corrections — the original evidence, suggestion, and event history stay append-only and are never rewritten.

advisor.title: Ask AI about your numbers
advisor.description: The advisor explains, cites Swedish sources, and drafts review actions — but it never posts anything. Every proposal waits for your explicit approval in the review gate.

article50.statement: You are chatting with an AI system (EU AI Act, Article 50). Answers are AI-generated and grounded in your report pack; any action the advisor proposes executes only after your explicit approval through the ordinary review queue.

advisor.emptyState: Ask about your cash position, VAT, deadlines, or the review queue. Answers cite their sources, and proposals always wait for your approval.

input.label: Ask a grounded question
input.placeholder: How is our cash position right now?
input.hint: The advisor cites Swedish sources and proposes actions — nothing is posted without your explicit approval.

threads.title: Conversations
threads.subtitle: Stored locally in this browser.
threads.empty: Ask a question to start your first conversation on this device.

approval.awaiting: Draft by AI — awaiting your approval
approval.gateNote: Approving executes the ordinary review decision — the review gate stays the only path to a posted voucher.
approval.respondedApproved: Approval sent — the advisor is confirming…
approval.respondedRejected: Rejection sent — the advisor is confirming…

tool.deniedRow: The proposal was rejected — the item stays in the review queue for your manual decision.

error.fallback: The advisor request could not be completed.

disabled.title: The AI advisor is turned off
disabled.message: This workspace has the advisor disabled under AI posture. Bookkeeping, capture, and the review queue keep working without it — no AI runs in the background.

about.label: About this AI
about.title: What runs here, and under whose authority

providers.local-demo: Local demo runtime (deterministic, no external AI service)
providers.unavailable: Unavailable — no AI provider is configured

about.approvalStatement: The AI suggests and drafts — it never posts. Every AI proposal becomes a ledger entry only after your explicit approval in the review queue.
about.unavailable: Runtime information could not be loaded.

aiPosture.article50: Transparency notice (EU AI Act, Article 50): you are always told when you interact with an AI system here, and AI-generated content is labeled as such.

advisor.title: AI advisor chat
advisor.description: The grounded advisor on the Advisor screen. Turning it off hides the chat — bookkeeping, capture, and the review queue keep working without it.

suggestions.title: AI suggestions in the review queue
suggestions.description: Confidence bands, suggested accounts, and AI reasoning on review cards and widgets. Turning them off keeps every human review action fully operable.

aiPosture.needsCompany: Save your company settings first — the AI posture is stored with them.
aiPosture.saveError: Could not save the AI posture.

fiscalYear.title: Fiscal year and VAT cadence.
fiscalYear.description: The fiscal year start month drives every fiscal-quarter report window and the statutory tax timeline. The VAT reporting cadence is shown here and edited together with the company profile.
fiscalYear.previewNote: The window and deadline below follow the selected start month — save to apply it to reports and the tax timeline.
fiscalYear.arsredovisningBody: Annual report to Bolagsverket for the fiscal year ending {fyEnd}.
fiscalYear.vatEditHint: Edited together with the company profile.
fiscalYear.needsCompany: Save your company settings first — the fiscal year is stored on the workspace profile with them.
fiscalYear.saveError: Could not save the fiscal year.

compliance.title: Ledger integrity, verified.
compliance.description: The hash-chain verdict for this workspace's append-only event ledger, the recent event tail with actor attribution, and the statutory retention baseline the ledger exists to satisfy.
compliance.unavailable: The integrity summary could not be loaded.
compliance.scopeNote: Linkage verification only: genesis plus previous-hash links — removal, reordering, and insertion are caught. Payload recomputation is a documented follow-up, not a claim this panel makes.
compliance.recentEmpty: No events yet — the chain starts with your first capture.
compliance.retentionBody: Accounting records are kept until the end of the seventh year after the calendar year in which the fiscal year ended. The append-only ledger and immutable evidence files are how this workspace meets that duty.

retention.title: Nothing is deleted. That is the policy.
retention.description: Bokföringslagen's seven-year archiving duty, and how the append-only ledger and immutable evidence storage meet it in each runtime mode.
retention.ledgerBody: Accounting events are never edited or deleted. Corrections are appended as new events with actor and timestamp provenance, so history stays complete by construction.
retention.evidenceBody: Evidence files are written once with a recorded SHA-256 hash and are never overwritten. The ledger references them; it never replaces them.
retention.statuteBody: Accounting records must be kept until the end of the seventh year after the calendar year in which the fiscal year ended (Bokföringslagen 7 kap. 2 §).
retention.storageDemo1: Ledger events live in the API's in-memory store and reset when it restarts.
retention.storageDemo2: Capture drafts are held locally in your browser (IndexedDB) until promoted.
retention.storageDemo3: No demo data leaves your machine — and nothing in demo mode satisfies the statutory archiving duty.
retention.storageNormal1: Ledger events persist append-only in Supabase Postgres (Stockholm).
retention.storageNormal2: Evidence files persist in Azure Blob Storage (Sweden Central), written via short-lived signed URLs.
retention.storageNormal3: Both stores keep records within the EU, in ordered, accessible form.
retention.roadmapBody: Per-class legal-hold toggles and retention-expiry tooling are not built, so there are no controls to show here. When they land, every hold will be an attributed ledger event — not a silent flag.

team.title: One workspace, one actor — honestly.
team.description: There is no login or invitation system yet. Every ledger event still records who did it, so the attribution spine that multi-user needs is already in place.
team.currentBody: Every action in this workspace — captures, approvals, imports, settings — is recorded on the event ledger under this actor id.
team.actorsBody: Attribution read live from the most recent events on the ledger — the only roles that exist today.
team.actorsUnavailable: Recent event attribution could not be loaded.
team.seatBody: A free accountant seat is a design commitment: your accountant reviews and approves in the same review gate you use, with their own actor id on every decision. The event attribution above is the seam it plugs into.
team.inviteNote: Invitations are not built yet. There is no invite form here on purpose — when it exists, it will be real.

integrations.title: What is connected, honestly.
integrations.description: Real signals from the running system — no decorative connection cards. Demo mode swaps every external service for an explicit local stub.

sie.title: SIE 4 import & export
sie.body: Spec-valid SIE 4 in both directions (PC8/CP437). Import replays vouchers through the append-only ledger; export serializes the journal.

ai.title: AI advisor (Azure OpenAI)
ai.bodyDemo: The demo runtime answers deterministically from your projections — no external AI service is called.
ai.bodyNormal: Grounded advisor chat and narrative phrasing. Configuration is reported by the API — model and host, never secrets.
ai.unavailable: Runtime information could not be loaded.

blob.title: Evidence storage (Azure Blob)
blob.bodyDemo: Demo mode stores nothing in Azure — uploads go to an explicit local stub.
blob.bodyNormal: Evidence files are written to Azure Blob Storage via short-lived User-Delegation SAS URLs minted by the API's managed identity.
blob.note: Per-service configuration is not exposed by the current API surface — this card reports the runtime mode, not a live storage probe.

ocr.title: Document extraction (Azure Document Intelligence)
ocr.bodyDemo: Demo mode derives deterministic extraction fields from the file itself — plausible, honest, and offline.
ocr.bodyNormal: Invoices and receipts are extracted with Azure Document Intelligence when configured; without configuration the API falls back to the deterministic stub.
ocr.note: Per-service configuration is not exposed by the current API surface — this card reports the runtime mode, not a live extraction probe.

peppol.title: Peppol e-invoicing readiness
peppol.what: Peppol is the EU network for structured e-invoices — increasingly the default rail for B2B and public-sector invoicing across Europe.
peppol.ready: Architecturally ready: every posting is an append-only event with structured, BAS-coded voucher lines and immutable evidence — the shape a Peppol document maps onto.
peppol.honest: Transport is not implemented. JPX cannot send or receive Peppol documents yet, and no access point is connected.

email.title: Email intake
email.body: A per-workspace intake address that turns forwarded invoices into capture drafts. Not built yet — there is no address to show.

replay.title: Product tours
replay.description: Replay the opt-in walkthroughs whenever you want a refresher. Checklist progress still comes from your real ledger data.

reportsDrill.cta: How do I drill into a number?

checklist.title: Your getting-started checklist
checklist.content: Each step completes when the real artifact exists — capture, approve, import, ask the advisor, and set your company profile.

navigation.title: Five places to work
navigation.content: Today for the queue, Capture for evidence, Books for the journal, Reports for P&L and VAT, and Settings for company setup.

capture.title: Capture from anywhere
capture.content: Open the capture sheet for camera, upload, paste, or share intake — every path lands in the same draft queue.

demo.title: Demo mode is intentional
demo.content: Local scaffold data and offline AI keep the product explorable. Nothing posts without your explicit approval.

command-palette.title: Search anything
command-palette.content: Press ⌘K or Ctrl K to jump to vouchers, reviews, and account balances from anywhere in the app.

dropzone.title: Drop or pick files
dropzone.content: Drag receipts here or click to browse. Files become local drafts first so the UI stays responsive.

quick-add.title: Quick-add tiles
quick-add.content: Camera, upload, paste, and share each feed the same pipeline — usually three taps or fewer to a draft.

drafts.title: Promote drafts
drafts.content: Drafts stay local until you promote them into reviewable evidence on the ledger.

archive.title: Evidence archive
archive.content: After you approve a review, posted evidence shows up here with hash-chain provenance.

sie.title: Import prior bookkeeping
sie.content: Bring SIE 4 history from another Swedish system — imported vouchers appear in Books and Reports.

queue-toggle.title: Review queue
queue-toggle.content: Switch to the queue when you are ready to decide. AI suggests — you approve every posting.

review-card.title: One decision at a time
review-card.content: Each card bundles extracted fields, proposed BAS accounts, and cited Swedish rules.

confidence.title: Confidence band
confidence.content: High, medium, and low badges reflect how strongly the suggestion matches your history and the document.

accept.title: Explicit approval
accept.content: Accept posts the voucher to the append-only ledger. Nothing mutates until you click or press Y.

actions.title: Other decisions
actions.content: Edit lines, book without VAT, or reject when the suggestion is wrong — every path stays auditable.

hotkeys.title: Keyboard shortcuts
hotkeys.content: Y accept · E edit · B book without VAT · N reject while a card is focused.

empty.title: Queue is empty
empty.content: Capture a receipt first — then return here to approve your first posting. Each step completes when the real artifact exists.

period.title: Period scope
period.content: Books and Reports share the same period selector — month, quarter, fiscal year, or year-to-date.

journal.title: Journal view
journal.content: Every posted voucher appears here with supplier filters and links back to evidence.

tabs.title: More ledger views
tabs.content: General ledger, trial balance, and supplier rollups live on the other tabs.

close.title: Period close
close.content: The close checklist walks through what still blocks a clean month-end.

period.title: Reporting period
period.content: One report pack per period drives KPIs, narrative, charts, and statements — they cannot drift apart.

kpis.title: At-a-glance KPIs
kpis.content: Result, cash, revenue, and net VAT summarize the period before you read the prose.

narrative.title: This period in words
narrative.content: Plain-language bullets explain what moved — each links to the underlying statement.

drill.title: Drill to vouchers
drill.content: Click any account line to open the drill drawer with journal lines for that account.

export.title: Export and print
export.content: Print the pack as PDF or download a SIE file for your accountant.

mobile-nav.title: Advisor on mobile
mobile-nav.content: Tap Advisor in the header to ask grounded questions about your numbers.

rail.title: Advisor in the rail
rail.content: The sixth rail item opens the AI advisor — grounded, cited, and never able to post on its own.

prompts.title: Suggested prompts
prompts.content: Start from observation-driven questions or type your own — every answer cites Swedish sources.

article50.title: AI transparency
article50.content: EU AI Act Article 50 labeling stays visible so generated guidance is never mistaken for a posted fact.

chat.title: Tool approvals
chat.content: When the advisor proposes a posting, you still approve it through the same review gate.

advisor.title: Find the advisor
advisor.content: Tap Advisor in the header to open grounded chat — it is not in the mobile dock yet.

drill.title: Drill any account
drill.content: Click a balance-sheet or P&L line to inspect the underlying journal entries.
